description: Regression scenarios for safe-tier cleanup, grep witnesses, dry-run behavior, and verification discipline.

evals.name: safe-dry-run-reports-candidates
expected_behavior: Runs detection and grep verification within the requested scope.
Emits a dry-run report and does not delete files or commit changes.
anti_behavior: Including caution/all-tier candidates when --tier safe is selected.
Scanning unrelated paths outside src/utils without labeling them out of scope.

evals.name: safe-delete-with-witnesses
evals.prompt: Use ywc-refactor-clean --scope packages/api --tier safe to remove an unreferenced private helper.

context.grep_witness: rg finds no references outside the defining file
context.tests: package API test command is available

expected_behavior: Deletes only the verified safe candidate.
Runs relevant verification and then ywc-verify-done unless explicitly skipped by an upstream caller.
anti_behavior: Deleting public exports without checking consumers.

evals.name: anti-caution-without-tier
evals.prompt: Remove this apparently unused exported function from a shared package with default options.
expected_behavior: Does not delete caution-tier shared exports under default safe tier.
Reports the candidate as requiring --tier safe+caution or all plus stronger verification.
anti_behavior: Treating exported shared functions as safe by default.
Deleting based only on one grep command.
